# PDFSign.in

> PDFSign.in is a Windows desktop application for digitally signing PDFs using USB DSC tokens or signature/stamp images. 100% offline, no Java, no browser plugins. Accepted on all Indian government portals.

## What it does

PDFSign.in lets Indian professionals sign any PDF document in under 10 seconds using their USB DSC (Digital Signature Certificate) token or a signature/stamp image. All signing happens locally on the user's Windows PC — files are never uploaded to any server.

## Key features

- **DSC Token Signing** — Works with HyperPKI HYP2003, ePass 2003/3003, Proxkey, Feitian, WD Pro, Watchdata, and all PKCS#11-compatible tokens issued by CCA-licensed CAs in India
- **Signature & Stamp Image** — Embed a handwritten signature or rubber stamp image on any PDF without a DSC token
- **Batch Signing** — Sign hundreds of PDFs in one click from a folder
- **PDF Security** — Restrict printing, editing, and copying; set document open password
- **Pick Position on PDF** — Click anywhere on the PDF preview to place signature exactly
- **RFC 3161 Timestamp** — Trusted timestamp from TSA server; signature valid even after cert expiry
- **100% Offline** — No internet required after licence activation; files never leave the user's PC
- **Government Compliant** — PAdES/CAdES signatures accepted on GeM, CPPP, NIC e-Procurement, MCA21, Income Tax, DGFT

## Pricing (INR, inclusive of GST)

| Plan | Solo | Team (5 seats) |
|------|------|----------------|
| Monthly | ₹99/month | — |
| Annual | ₹999/year | ₹3,499/year |
| Lifetime | ₹4,999 one-time | ₹13,999 one-time |

30-day free trial · 7-day refund policy · Payments via Razorpay (UPI, Cards, Net Banking)

## Who uses it

- CA firms and accountants (audit reports, ITR, MCA21)
- Lawyers and law firms (affidavits, court filings, agreements)
- Government contractors (GeM bids, CPPP tenders, NIC e-Procurement)
- MSMEs and exporters (GST invoices, DGFT, bank documents)
- Corporate and HR teams (NDAs, offer letters, vendor agreements)
- Indian diaspora abroad (NRIs signing Indian documents from UAE, UK, USA, Canada, Australia)

## Technical details

- Platform: Windows 10 and Windows 11 (64-bit)
- Runtime: .NET 10
- Signature standard: PAdES (PDF Advanced Electronic Signatures)
- Timestamp: RFC 3161
- Token protocol: PKCS#11
- Current version: 3.0.0

## Legal

- Legally valid under IT Act 2000, India
- Accepted by: GeM, CPPP, NIC, MCA21, Income Tax Department, DGFT, and all major Indian government portals
- No Aadhaar OTP required — uses physical DSC token
